text: Being here, I feel both curiosity and anticipation stirring within me. The transparent glass room with its single occupant and the many empty chairs suggests a moment of quiet before the arrival of others—like the calm expectation of a philosopher before a symposium. Moving to the vivid R+D exhibit, I sense creativity at play: knowledge materializes not only in books but also in the bold, digital displays and tactile prototypes. Here, the union of research and design invites me to question the boundaries between thought and action, observation and participation. I sense possibility, as if I stand on the threshold of a new idea, ready for discovery.
